headline: Amazon security research reportedly led to the White House’s Anthropic Fable ban
summary: Amazon research reportedly triggered a White House export ban on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5. CEO Andy Jassy's conversations with the White House contributed to the decision. The ban targets advanced AI models due to cybersecurity concerns.

headline: X-Men ’97 has what Master of the Universe is missing
summary: Marvel and Mattel are both reviving iconic childhood animated heroes in 2026. X-Men '97 Season 2 will send mutants into an apocalyptic future. The article implies X-Men '97 captures nostalgia better than Masters of the Universe.

headline: Sealed Super Mario Bros. sells for a record $3 million
summary: A factory-sealed copy of Super Mario Bros. sold for a record $3 million at auction. This price shatters the previous record of $2 million, also for a Super Mario Bros. copy. The sale follows a previous controversial auction.

headline: Microsoft hasn’t ruled out spinning off Xbox
summary: Microsoft is considering a major restructuring of its Xbox division, including potential layoffs. The company hasn't ruled out spinning off Xbox into a separate entity. This reevaluation impacts plans for the next-gen Project Helix console.

headline: Rockstar Co-Founder Dan Houser Says There’s No Right Way to Play an Open-World Game
summary: Rockstar co-founder Dan Houser spoke at the 2026 Tribeca Festival. He discussed making open-world games and interconnected multimedia universes. Houser emphasized that players can enjoy open-world games in diverse ways.

headline: Microsoft CEO Says 'There's More Monetization of Xbox Games Happening on YouTube Than at Microsoft'
summary: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella claims YouTube monetizes Xbox games more than Microsoft itself. This follows Xbox boss Asha Sharma's commitment to 'reset' the gaming branch. The statement highlights a potential disconnect in revenue streams for Xbox.

headline: George Miller Reportedly Wants to Make One More Mad Max Movie and a TV Show Before Selling the Franchise
summary: Mad Max creator George Miller is reportedly seeking studios for a final Mad Max film. He also plans to develop a Mad Max TV show. Miller intends to sell the franchise rights after these new projects.

headline: X-Men '97 Season 2, Episodes 1-4 Review (Spoiler-Free)
summary: The first four episodes of X-Men '97 Season 2 are reviewed. The season continues to deliver thrilling action and deep character drama. It successfully blends Marvel nostalgia with compelling storytelling.

headline: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
summary: Trump announced a US-Iran deal would be signed on Sunday. However, Iran stated an exact date is undecided and it won't be tomorrow. This creates uncertainty regarding the agreement's immediate future.

headline: Resident doctors cancel strike after new offer from government
summary: Resident doctors have canceled their planned strike. The decision follows a new offer from the government. The strike was scheduled to run from Monday to Friday.

headline: Molly Russell's dad says PM rushing social media restrictions 'deplorable'
summary: Molly Russell's father criticized the PM for rushing social media restrictions. He believes the plans are accelerated for 'political reasons.' His daughter took her own life after viewing harmful content online.

headline: Jarvis says Labour must 'meet the moment' on defence spending
summary: Labour's new defence secretary, Jarvis, urged the party to prioritize defence spending. He stated his commitment to ensuring the military has necessary resources. The comments were made in the Sunday Telegraph.
